# daytona_job (Data Source)

Reads a Daytona background job by ID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "daytona_job" "example" {
  id = "job-id"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Daytona job ID.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Job creation timestamp.
- `error_message` (String) Error message, when available.
- `payload` (String) Job payload.
- `resource_id` (String) Resource ID associated with the job.
- `resource_type` (String) Resource type associated with the job.
- `status` (String) Job status.
- `trace_context_json` (String) Job trace context as JSON.
- `type` (String) Job type.
- `updated_at` (String) Job update timestamp.
